info.name: VidAsk AI - Full API Test Suite
info.description: Complete Postman Collection v2.1 for VidAsk AI backend APIs. Import this collection and the included VidAsk_AI_Local environment file, select that environment, keep BASE_URL as http://localhost:3000 or change it to your server URL, then run the collection from top to bottom. IDs such as videoId, uploadVideoId, publicVideoId, and assistantTranscriptId are stored automatically as environment variables by test scripts.

exec: pm.environment.set('sampleTranscript', 'Welcome to VidAsk AI. In the first minute we explain how transcript indexing works. Around the second minute we discuss summaries, topic breakdowns, and timestamps. Later we cover question answering, context retrieval, playback links, and session cleanup for a video learning companion. The final section explains how learners can ask precise questions and receive grounded answers from the transcript.');
pm.test('Response does not leak passwordHash', function () {
pm.test('JSON response has a recognizable shape', function () {
pm.test('API envelope contains success and message', function () {

item.name: Ask public video before transcript exists

exec: pm.test('Status is 422 because transcript is required', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(422); });
pm.test('Request failed as expected', function () { pm.expect(json.success).to.eql(false); });
pm.test('Error mentions transcript', function () { pm.expect(json.message).to.include('Transcript is required'); });

pm.test('Request failed as expected', function () { pm.expect(json.success).to.eql(false); });

exec: pm.test('Status is 400 because public playback is unsupported', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(400); });
pm.test('Request failed as expected', function () { pm.expect(json.success).to.eql(false); });

item.name: Ask assistant with missing transcript id

exec: pm.test('Request failed as expected', function () { pm.expect(json.success).to.eql(false); });
pm.test('Uploaded video was deleted', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.equal(null); });
pm.test('Request failed as expected', function () { pm.expect(json.success).to.eql(false); });
pm.test('Raw uploaded video was deleted', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.equal(null); });
pm.test('Public analysis was deleted', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.equal(null); });
pm.test('No-transcript public analysis was deleted', function () { pm.expect(json.data).to.equal(null); });
pm.test('Assistant chunk index transcript was deleted', function () { pm.expect(json.data.deleted).to.eql(true); });
